summary: Common Vice Wine Bar has an existing website, and the strongest useful gap is: proof is not doing enough work.
outreachHook: I noticed your site has a fixable trust gap: The captured text does not clearly surface reviews, project proof, warranty, licences, or gallery proof.
openDesignDirection: Common Vice Wine Bar should feel like the obvious restaurant choice in Brisbane. Add a proof section with real reviews, project examples, and verified guarantees/credentials. Rewrite title around "restaurant Restaurant" while keeping the business name.

captured.title: Common Vice Wine Bar | New Farm, Brisbane
headings: Welcome to Common Vice, a relaxed neighbourhood wine bar in the heart of New Farm.

Just a short stroll from the Brisbane River and Powerhouse Theater, Common Vice is your local go-to for expressive Australian natural wines, cold craft beer and Modern Australian, European style share plates.

findings.title: Proof is not doing enough work
findings.evidence: The captured text does not clearly surface reviews, project proof, warranty, licences, or gallery proof.
findings.impact: The site may feel informational rather than convincing.
findings.fix: Add a proof section with real reviews, project examples, and verified guarantees/credentials.

findings.title: Basic trust/legal links are thin
findings.evidence: Privacy or terms links were not captured from visible page links.
findings.impact: This is a minor trust and SEO hygiene gap, especially when forms collect customer data.
findings.fix: Add privacy and terms links in the footer when forms or tracking are used.

checks.title: Common Vice Wine Bar | New Farm, Brisbane
checks.metaDescription: Neighbourhood wine bar dedicated to expressive Australian wines, seasonal food from local producers, and warm, attentive service.

findings.title: Title does not target the main local intent
findings.evidence: Captured title: "Common Vice Wine Bar | New Farm, Brisbane". Inferred keyword: "restaurant Restaurant".
findings.impact: The page may rank or click worse for the service/location query we care about.
findings.fix: Rewrite title around "restaurant Restaurant" while keeping the business name.

findings.title: Meta description is too generic for the lead angle
findings.evidence: Captured meta description does not clearly include "restaurant Restaurant" or a close variant.
findings.impact: The search snippet may not match high-intent local searches.
findings.fix: Mention service, location, and a concrete result or quote action.

findings.title: H1 structure needs cleanup
findings.impact: A single clear H1 helps both search and page comprehension.
findings.fix: Use one H1 focused on the primary service/location promise.
